backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a debt collection case management system with cases, activities, and documents storage, plus authorization and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three UI changes: adding a History link toggle in ActivitySection, making comment history collapsible, and repositioning submit/cancel buttons in CaseDetail.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing a phone-optimized debt collection app with authentication, case management, and activity tracking.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for the Kollect Lite brand.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Kollect Lite React application with viewport meta tag and root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component with TanStack Router setup, Internet Identity authentication check, and routes for TaskQueue and CaseDetail pages.
Activity comment form component with action/outcome dropdowns, textarea, and a toggleable History link that shows/hides the ActivityTimeline.
frontend/src/components/ActivityTimeline: Scrollable timeline component displaying dummy activity history with timestamps, action/outcome badges, payment details, and comments.
frontend/src/components/CaseCard.tsx: Compact clickable case card displaying debtor info, status badge, customer ID with copy button, phone number, and color-coded DPD badge.
frontend/src/components/CopyButton.tsx: Small button component that copies text to clipboard and shows a check icon confirmation for 2 seconds.
frontend/src/components/DocumentsSection: Displays a list of dummy documents for a case with upload and scan buttons. Shows document name, type, and upload date in a compact card layout.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Application header component with Kollect Lite branding and a logout button that clears Internet Identity authentication and query cache.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper component with header, outlet for nested routes, and footer containing copyright and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: Login screen component that displays Kollect Lite branding and triggers Internet Identity authentication when the login button is clicked.
frontend/src/components/PhoneMockup.tsx: iPhone frame mockup component that wraps children in a realistic phone UI with notch, status bar, and scrollable content area.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Badge component that displays case status (ESCALATED, ACTIVE, PTP) with color-coded styling based on the CaseStatus enum.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor with Internet Identity authentication, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating case data, activities, and documents through the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes and Kollect Lite brand colors (teal-dark, teal-darker, gray-bg).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CaseDetail.tsx: Case detail page component with dummy case data lookup, displaying debtor information, status, financial details, and sections for activities and documents in a phone mockup layout.
frontend/src/pages/TaskQueue.tsx: Defines the TaskQueue page component with dummy collection case data (20 cases) and includes imports for CaseCard, PhoneMockup, and backend types including Case and CaseStatus.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, container settings, border radius variables, shadows, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document describing UI layout refinement features including collapsible comment history toggle and repositioned submit/cancel buttons below document section.
